name: evaluacionesdes
description: Sistema de Evaluación de Desempeño - Monorepo

scripts.dev: concurrently -n BACKEND,FRONTEND -c "blue.bold,green.bold" "npm run backend:dev" "npm run frontend:dev"
scripts.dev:prod: concurrently -n BACKEND,FRONTEND -c "blue.bold,green.bold" "npm run backend:prod" "npm run frontend:dev"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
